text: As I stand before this glass wall and peer into a vibrant, modern space devoted to 'R+D'—research and development—the atmosphere feels charged with curiosity and anticipation. I sense the promise of innovation and human ingenuity, yet I am reminded of the boundaries that glass creates; it invites my gaze yet keeps me at a distance. This threshold between observer and participant evokes in me both excitement and a yearning to connect more directly with the ideas and possibilities inside.
